name: Dry-Run and Real Path Filter Parity
description: When a pipeline supports filtering (e.g., --group, --tag, --file), every code path must apply the filter — including dry-run mode. A common bug is building the dry-run path first without filtering, then adding filtering only to the real execution path.

trigger.errorMessage: Dry-run mode ignores filter options (e.g., --group TG1 still shows all groups in dry-run output)

steps.description: Pass filter parameters through to the dry-run code path. If the real path applies filters in parseResults(), the dry-run path must apply the same filter in buildDryRunResult().
Add test case that runs dry-run WITH a filter and verifies the output only contains filtered items.
